sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n99813" key="suneari/zw" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">συνεᾰρίζω</orth>, <sense id="n99813.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">pass the spring with</tr_>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">τισι</itype> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Plu.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.959c</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
